name: Montego Monty & Me Adult Cat - 20kg
description: Monty & Me is specially formulated to give your cat the perfect balance of taste, nutrition, and energy for a long, happy, and healthy life. Benefits at a Glance Delicious & Strength-Building: Optimum protein and fat levels keep your kitty strong, healthy, and full of vitality. Bright Eyes & a Strong Heart: High-quality animal proteins with added Taurine support sharp vision and healthy heart function. Strong Immunity: Natural antioxidants, plus Vitamins E & C, help protect cells, support circulation, and boost the immune system. Playful Energy: A perfect blend of essential nutrients, vitamins, minerals, and Taurine fuels your cat’s energy for play, growth, and happiness. Key Ingredients Corn*, poultry meal, wheat bran, rice, corn gluten, animal fat, fish meal, brewer’s yeast, beet pulp, fish oil, minerals, vitamins, Taurine, L-Lysine, and DL-Methionine. *May contain GMO’s. Nutritional Additives (per kg) Vitamins: A (10,000 IU), D3 (775 IU), E (75 IU), C (50 mg) Minerals: Potassium chloride, zinc sulphate, iron sulphate, copper sulphate, manganese sulphate, potassium iodide Other Additives: Approved antioxidants & palatability enhancers for great taste Typical Analysis Crude Protein: 28% Moisture: 10% Total Fat: 12% Crude Fibre: 3% Crude Ash: 6.5% Calcium: 1.2% | Phosphorus: 0.8% Linoleic Acid: 2.5% Lysine: 1% | Methionine: 0.5% Taurine: 0.125% Metabolizable Energy : Optimized for active cats Monty & Me provides complete and balanced nutrition helping your cat stay healthy, happy, and playful every single day.
shortDescription: Monty & Me is specially formulated to give your cat the perfect balance of taste, nutrition, and energy for a long, happy, and healthy life. Benefits
